spanish: Te recomiendo que primero vayas a la web spanlanguagecoach.com, descargues en formato PDF la guía de vocabulario.
english: I recommend that you first go to the website spanlanguagecoach.com and download the vocabulary guide in PDF format.
explanation: Present subjunctive after 'recomendar que' (vayas, descargues) - expressing recommendation

spanish: Si tú enseñas la ventana de tu casa, pueden saber dónde vives.
english: If you show the window of your house, they can know where you live.
explanation: Conditional clause with present indicative for real situations (si + present, present)

spanish: Pensando que iban a ser un par de semanas, pero luego evidentemente se convirtió eso en mucho más.
english: Thinking it was going to be a couple of weeks, but then obviously it became much more.
explanation: Past imperfect 'iban a ser' for planned/intended future in the past

spanish: Ni casándote con uno de ellos te dan el pasaporte.
english: Not even marrying one of them do they give you the passport.
explanation: Gerund with 'ni' for emphasis (ni + gerund = not even by doing X)

spanish: Sí que me hubiese gustado tal vez dedicarle tiempo a ello, pero no sé, igual habría tenido algún potencial.
english: I would have liked perhaps to dedicate time to it, but I don't know, maybe I would have had some potential.
explanation: Past perfect subjunctive (hubiese gustado) + conditional perfect (habría tenido) for hypothetical past
